title: Removal of Redundant Pairs of Parentheses
description: Redundant parentheses, which do not change the behavior of the code or clarify the intent, can lead to misleading and complex code. These should be removed to improve code clarity.
recommendation: Remove redundant pairs of parentheses from the code to improve readability and avoid confusion.
impact: Improves code readability and maintainability by removing unnecessary complexity.
